data.name: U4iA - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
As the only son in a wealthy family, your life should have been good. But several past traumas have forced you to leave your old life behind you and start anew on the exotic Caribbean island, commonly known as Euphoria.

Curious about what this new location can offer, you start getting to know new people and begin to settle in. Your past can't seem to let you go, but luckily, there are good-looking distractions.

As you get used to your new life, you also meet new girls. Things are starting to look good. Your new employer has an indecent proposal. Will you accept, or do the girls on the beach interest you more?

Dealing with the aftermath of Gina's disappearance, Lars has a plan to lift everyone's spirits. Maybe a trip to a luxury mansion can set the mood to get to know everyone better?

As you get closer to the inevitable season finale, it's time to get romantic with the girls. Who knows when things will go back to normal again.

U4iA - Season 1 contains:

  • More than 12,000 images that have been rendered in 4K and scaled down to HD to ensure the maximum amount of detail.

  • 429 animations with a total running length of over 40 minutes.

  • 205 Licensed songs, including one made exclusively for U4iA.

  • Free roam events and in-game phone content to break up the basic visual novel experience.

  • Several unique paths with exclusive content for each one.

  • Freedom of choice. Romance? Flirt? Friends with benefits? Reject? One? Many? Your call!

data.short_description: What could be better than restart your new life at an exotic Caribbean island nicknamed Euphoria?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 16 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or newer
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 16 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 or Kernel 3.x+ distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 16 GB 可用空間

  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 16 GB available space
